breakdown: This PR fixes a bug where the streaming passthrough path was not normalizing rewards_box payloads that used non-standard keys (xp/gold_pieces instead of xp_gained/gold). The fix adds fallback logic in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui and ensures it's called in the non-level-up path. The new E2E test properly exercises the normalization by forcing the LLM to produce messy keys and verifying they get normalized. Naming is good with descriptive variables like raw_xp/raw_gold. Type safety and error handling could benefit from explicit type hints and more defensive checks.
key_changes: Add fallback key handling in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui: xp->xp_gained and gold_pieces->gold
Remove raw fallback keys (xp, gold_pieces) after normalization
Add E2E test file testing streaming passthrough normalization with messy LLM keys
